description:
Both mindmap samples show warnings:
- mindmap: text count (5 vs 6), path count (0 vs 4)
- mindmap_complex: text count (9 vs 10), path count differs, z_order issue

Visual similarity: 52.1% to 65.9%. Some text labels missing and z-order issue in complex sample. Check src/diagrams/mindmap/ against reference.
title: mindmap: Missing text elements and z-order issues
